# @json-express/kv-redis — AI Context

Redis-backed key-value store with TTL support. The production `kv-*` choice.

## Install — that is the whole integration
```
npm i @json-express/kv-redis
```
Discovery is automatic; with kv-memory also installed choose `jex.kv=@json-express/kv-redis`. **Never import this or instantiate ioredis in application logic.**

## Configuration (.env — case-insensitive)
| Key | Required | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| `jex.kv-redis.connectionString` | yes — boot fails loudly without it | Redis URI, e.g. `redis://user:pass@host:6379` |

## What it unlocks
- `ctx.kvStore.get/set/delete` in model hooks and custom endpoints; `{ ttlMs }` maps to Redis PX expiry. Failed writes throw — callers see real errors.
- Production backing for `plugin-identity` refresh/verify/reset tokens.
